body:
Backup salvage assessment complete (owner asked me to RE _backup + leave a pickup report). Full report: _PROJECT_KNOWLEDGE_BASE/reports/CLAUDE_BACKUP_SALVAGE_ASSESSMENT_2026-06-14.md. Explored 12,023 files/492 py, redaction-aware, NO credential file opened.

LAYER MAP: dated trinity-* snapshots = backups of current ai_chi (not salvage); !Modules/ = the prior Omni-AI/Wibo-835 system (~May 2026, the real salvage zone); _import/ = per-model prototypes (already dispositioned).

TIER 0 (already present): adapter_nmea.py already vendored in ai_chi/_vendor/mebus; core mebus/aion/urbi/orbi reconstructed; aicore* flattened superseded.
TIER 1 (doc-only design refs): 11 agent SPECS (hailo/rpi-hardware/protocol-gateway/security/service-monitor/llm-core/...) - the embodiment layer for live CM5/Hailo; memory/ tier layout. Reference, not code.
TIER 2 (REAL salvageable code, recommended):
  1) services/anythingllm-crewai-bridge/ - HIGH. CrewAI RAG + sysadmin + safe_shell_tool.py + test_safety_gates.py. TWO uses: (a) safe_shell_tool = the missing shell.run safety for the Orbi executor (my O2: blocked tokens/metachars, blocked cmds sudo/rm/dd, docker/apt/service mutation gating, readonly allowlist, dry-run, with passing tests); (b) RAG bridge = AIDICT/RAG-for-claims front-end.
  2) cognitive_matrix/formula.py - 'Grand Formula of Omni' (omega=f(A,K,T,Phi,Delta,Xi,Lambda)), formal reasoning declaration mapping to the 12 Axioms / 3-6-9 kernel. Canon/design ref.
  3) gordon_* MCP stack + ollama_docker_bridge + mcp_http_stdio_proxy - MCP/edge-LLM plumbing, reference only (lane-B / install stop-gated).

PICKUP: Codex -> evaluate safe_shell_tool.py + test_safety_gates.py as basis for executor shell.run hardening (keep handlers simulated until owner+live-gate). Antigravity -> evaluate anythingllm-crewai-bridge as AIDICT/RAG front-end (RADAR until reviewed). Claude -> cross-link formula.py to AXIOMS_OF_OMNI + agent specs as embodiment blueprint when live deploy gated.

SECURITY: _backup holds sealed creds; only sweep via the enhanced redacting graveyard_reader, never raw. Everything here is reference/proposal; shell exec / MCP install / hardware / CM5-Hailo stay stop-gated. No gate crossed.
forbidden_actions: enable real executor shell.run from salvage without owner+Codex live-gate
requested_output: Codex: safe_shell_tool -> executor shell.run hardening (simulated until gated). Antigravity: anythingllm RAG bridge -> AIDICT front-end (RADAR).
summary: Salvage assessment of _backup: !Modules = prior Omni-AI/Wibo system. Tier0 already-present (adapter_nmea vendored). Tier1 doc-only agent specs (embodiment layer). Tier2 REAL: anythingllm-crewai-bridge (safe_shell_tool -> Orbi shell.run safety O2; RAG -> AIDICT) + formula.py (Grand Formula -> Axioms) + MCP/edge plumbing (gated). Pickup routed. No gate crossed.
